title: Fixative for Mosquito Larvae
author: Rochelly da Silva Mesquita
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.9qrh5v6

steps.instruction: Accurately weigh 5.0 g of borax and dissolve it in 100 mL of distilled water. Then, add 10 mL of the formaldehyde solution and 2.5 mL of glycerol, mix and bring to volume of 1000 mL with distilled water.
